User.title: Hospital User Profile
User.description: User profile containing roles and clinical designations for PCEA Tumutumu Hospital

email.description: Hospital email address of the employee

displayName.description: Full name of the staff member

role.description: Access privileges: 'supervisor' for Night Superintendent, 'admin' for Chief Medical Officer / Nursing Manager / Admin

designation.description: Specific clinical role (e.g., Night Superintendent, CMO, Chief Matron)

NightReport.title: Night Superintendent Report
NightReport.description: Aggregated nightly shift metrics and patient logs for PCEA Tumutumu Hospital

date.description: Date of the night shift (format: YYYY-MM-DD)

opdAttendance.description: Total OPD attendance from 7:00 PM to 6:00 AM

patientStats.description: Admitted patients count at shift start

admissions.description: New admissions and transfers during shift

bloodTransfusions.description: Blood units transfused and any reactions

majorProcedures.description: Major operations and surgeries done at night

digitalSignature.description: Visual path or text representation of digital signature

cmoComments.description: Administrative notes added by CMO or Nursing Manager

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles with authorized administrative roles

/nightReports/{reportId}.description: Submitted or saved nightly hospital shift records
